banner.title: AmoebaTalk
banner.desc: Manage customer messages from Facebook, Zalo, LINE... in one place

hero.headline: Every customer message, one conversation.
hero.sub: Facebook, Zalo, LINE, KakaoTalk, WhatsApp, Instagram — all channels in one place

channels.title: Chat wherever your customers are
channels.sub: Manage 7+ messaging channels in one unified inbox

features.title: Why AmoebaTalk?
features.inboxDesc: View and respond to messages from all channels in one place
features.aiDesc: AI analyzes customer intent and suggests optimal responses automatically
features.analyticsDesc: Monitor conversation volume, response time, and satisfaction in real-time
features.teamDesc: Assign conversations, internal notes, and tags for efficient teamwork
features.ecommerceDesc: Automatically link Shopify, Odoo orders with customer conversations
features.securityDesc: Data encryption and role-based access control for safe operation
